title: Using dates in forms
excerpt: I’m using a forms board to allow internal staff to request taxi bookings made on their behalf. In the questions I had hoped to allow the staff to select a date and time for each journey, there are no question types that …

posts.author: kenn (Sarah)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m using a forms board to allow internal staff to request taxi bookings made on their behalf. In the questions I had hoped to allow the staff to select a date and time for each journey, there are no question types that allow for this. I would prefer to avoid free text.

Is there a way to achieve this within monday or do I need to integrate a separate calendar app?

I am very new to this and not particularly good at this, so apologies if this is a simple question! Thanks.
